items.docs: Retrieve all documented police brutality incidents from the 2020 George Floyd protests. Returns a JSON object containing metadata and an array of incident records with location, date, description, tags, and source links.

info.name: 2020 Police Brutality Get All Incidents V2

items.docs: Retrieve all documented police brutality incidents in version 2 format. Provides the same incident data as v1 with an updated schema structure for improved data consistency and additional fields.

info.name: 2020 Police Brutality Get All Incidents as CSV

items.docs: Retrieve all documented police brutality incidents in CSV format. Provides tabular data suitable for spreadsheet analysis and data import.
